👥 User Management
🔗 Google Apps Script URL Not tested

Paste your Google Apps Script Web App URL to connect to Google Drive for real-time multi-user sync, daily reports and user management.

How to get the URL:
1. Open script.google.com and open your WJRS project
2. Click Deploy → Manage Deployments
3. Copy the Web App URL (ends with /exec)
4. Paste above and click Save URL

📋 How to get your Script URL:
  1. Go to script.google.com
  2. Open your WJRS project → Deploy → Manage Deployments
  3. Copy the Web App URL (ends with /exec)
  4. Paste above and click Save URL
  5. Click Test to verify connection
